violations.text: Establishment is lacking an allergen statement. English Food Allergies What You Need to Know Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/07/2026

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/07/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (pan) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Pan moved to 3 bay sink for washing and sanitizing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/07/2026
Soda Machine located in the lobby is in poor repair. Observed a leak under machine at the hose. New Violation. Correct By: 04/07/2026
The outside dumpster area observed with trash, litter, and/or other debris. Refuse areas must be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/07/2026
Food menu is lacking an allergy statement. English Food Allergies What You Need to Know Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2024
Establishment is lacking allergen statement. English Food Allergies What You Need to Know New Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the dumpster area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 03/15/2024
